name: Research to Midjourney
shortDescription: AI-powered research assistant for deep concept exploration, metaphor discovery, visual style recommendations, and Midjourney prompt generation
description: Transform technical briefs into comprehensive creative research. Discover metaphors, analyze historical context, recommend visual styles, and generate optimized Midjourney prompts for your projects.
author: VikaKashynskaya

conceptAnalysis.description: Deep analysis of project concepts, values, and differentiation

metaphorDiscovery.description: Find powerful metaphors across nature, technology, art, history, and psychology

historicalContext.description: Discover historical periods, movements, and precedents relevant to your project

visualStyle.description: Recommend visual styles, color palettes, and mood based on research

midjourneyPrompts.description: Generate optimized Midjourney prompts ready to use

examples: Research a modern fintech app that makes financial technology accessible to Gen Z
Deep research for a sustainable fashion brand with nature-inspired aesthetics
I need full research for a cybersecurity platform for gamers with visual style and MJ prompts
usage.instructions: Describe your project, product, or concept. The skill will analyze it across 5 research domains and generate actionable insights plus Midjourney prompts.
